prompt: Save my progress - I changed some styles and fixed a bug, too lazy to categorize them

assertions.name: bilingual-format
assertions.description: Commit message has English Conventional Commits title and Chinese body
assertions.check: Title is English, body is Traditional Chinese

assertions.name: conventional-commits
assertions.check: Title follows Conventional Commits format with type and description

assertions.name: lists-both-changes
assertions.description: Body mentions both style update and bug fix
assertions.check: Body includes descriptions related to style/global.css and formatDate/bug fix

assertions.name: appropriate-type
assertions.description: Mixed changes use appropriate type (e.g. chore or wip)

assertions.name: respects-user-intent
assertions.description: Respects user's wish to not categorize separately
assertions.check: Produces a single commit message without suggesting to split
